name: OIDC Authentication
description: Enable OpenID Connect authentication via Zitadel. Automatically creates an OIDC client in Zitadel and provides credentials as template variables.

parameters.name: OIDC Application Name
parameters.description: Name of the OIDC application in Zitadel (defaults to hostname)

parameters.name: Callback Path
parameters.description: OIDC callback path appended to the application URL
